description: Style NoteWe like an occasional dash of colour. We like basics that are simple yet stylish. We like excellent fits. We like clothes that are comfortable. Because of all this, we absolutely love fila! This T-shirt can be paired with jeans and sneakers for a sporty look on a day out, or in the evenings, pair it with clean look jeans, leather shoes and a structured jacket.Product DetailsBlue polo T-shirt with white panelling, has a cutaway collar, three button placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and branding on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not tumble, bleach or iron on print / decorationsUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
